login.title: Sign in
login.emailHelp: We'll email you a sign-in link.
login.emailSentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click it to continue.
login.emailErrorNoAccount: No account found for that email. Sign up on the mobile app first.
login.emailErrorGeneric: Could not send the link. Try again.
login.errorPhone: Enter a valid phone number, for example +252612345678.
login.errorSend: Could not send the code. Try again.
login.callbackError: That sign-in link didn't work. Try sending another.
